name: start_v3
description: Albayan platform — vanilla JS web app + FastAPI backend + Capacitor iOS/Android shells. See PLATFORM_FOUNDATION.md for platform rules.

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.sync:mobile: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:backend
scripts.release:prepare: npm run build && npm test && npm run sync:mobile && npm run verify:mobile
